reviews.comment:
No avisan antes de pagar en la tienda con que tarjetas trabajan, pésimo!

(Translated by Google)
They don't tell you which cards they accept before you pay in the store, terrible!

Few cars and very clean restrooms!!! Beautiful place to be outdoors

reviews.comment:
Limpio, completo, cómodo como la mayoría de los ACAs.
Tiene un amplio parque con mesitas y canillas para pasar un rato durante el descanso del viaje.

(Translated by Google)
Clean, well-equipped, and comfortable, like most ACAs.
It has a large park with tables and water fountains for relaxing during your travel break.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2MUxUQ29RRRAB

reviews.comment:
La estación muy linda, baños, y marketplace muy bien. Después de irnos ya llegando a Buenos Aires, se nos acabó la NAFTA, por lo que nos quedó la duda de que nos hayan cobrado mal. Es decir que podría ser que nos hayan puesto menos NAFTA de la que nos despacharon.... Nos quedó la duda....

(Translated by Google)
The station was very nice, the restrooms and the marketplace were great. After we left, just as we were approaching Buenos Aires, we ran out of gas, so we're left wondering if we were overcharged. That is, it's possible they put less gas in the tank than they dispensed... We're still not sure.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2bFBPM0h3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene todos los servicios para el viajero. El agua caliente es económica y funciona con Monedas.
Punto a favor tiene sector de juegos, salón para socios y amplia playa de estacionamiento para cualquier viajero - no es necesario ser del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
It has all the amenities a traveler needs. Hot water is inexpensive and coin-operated.
On the plus side, it has a games area, a members' lounge, and ample parking for all travelers—you don't need to be an ACA member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2NU0zckNREAE
